_primary_source: Primary source: (Levin, 2021) DOI 10.3389/fnsys.2021.768201 (bioelectric target-morphology attractor); (Pezzulo & Levin, 2015) DOI 10.1039/c5ib00221d; (Hopfield, 1982) DOI 10.1073/pnas.79.8.2554. Target morphology as an attractor reached from damaged states.
title: QA_MORPHOGENETIC_MEMORY_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Phase-Conjugate Morphogenetic Memory Cert [521]. 'mechanism' fixtures certify regeneration / no-chimera / systemic phase-lock on synthetic body plans; 'empirical' fixtures record the reference-impl results.

true_plan.description: mechanism: index of the true stored plan

global_phi.description: mechanism: systemic bioelectric shift on the probe

expected_naive_plan.description: mechanism: plan naive regeneration returns (fooled under a systemic shift when != true_plan)

expected_regen_plan.description: mechanism: plan index phase-locked recall regenerates (must == true_plan)
